issues.criterion: AEM code bus is operational (code.status should be 200)
issues.details: Admin API consistently returns code.status=400. Attempting to fetch static code files from the AEM CDN (https://main--eds-migration--manuel-vara.aem.page/scripts/scripts.js, /blocks/hero/hero.js, /styles/styles.css) all return HTTP 404. The CDN error message is: "Missing configuration (fetch p800 restarts: 0, shield: 0 - 404) [ Failed to determine configuration (fetch p100 restarts: 0 - 404 - Not Found) ]". A POST to /code sync job ran but processed 0 files. The orchestrator claimed code.status=200 but independent verification shows 400. Code files are NOT being served from the AEM CDN.
issues.remediation: The AEM Code Sync GitHub App may not be properly configured for this forked repo. Steps: (1) Verify the GitHub App "AEM Code Sync" (installationId: 34179329) actually has access to the manuel-vara/eds-migration repo (not just the parent jmffraiz/eds-migration). (2) Check if a helix-config.yaml is needed. (3) Ensure the app has repo read permissions. (4) Try manually triggering code sync via admin API with proper auth token.

issues.criterion: CSS selectors properly scoped to block name
issues.details: Two minor CSS scoping issues: (1) modal.css has body.modal-open { overflow: hidden; } - a body-level selector needed to prevent scroll when modal is open. This is a standard EDS pattern but technically outside .modal scope. (2) stats.css has .section.dark .stats .stats-number and .section.dark .stats .stats-label selectors starting with .section.dark instead of .stats - these are contextual overrides for dark section variants, an accepted EDS pattern.
issues.remediation: Low priority. For modal: acceptable as-is (common EDS pattern). For stats: acceptable as-is (section-variant styling is a standard EDS pattern). Both lint clean under stylelint.

evidence.finding: PASS: fstab.yaml exists at GitHub main with content: mountpoints: /: https://content.da.live/manuel-vara/eds-migration. Correct DA mountpoint. File not accessible via aem.page (404) due to code bus issue.

evidence.render_strategy: GitHub API authenticated GET per block
evidence.finding: PASS: All 18 blueprint blocks verified on main branch with .js and .css files (200 status each): accordion, breadcrumbs, cards, carousel, columns, content-filter, embed, fragment, hero, hubspot-form, modal, profile, quote, search, stats, table, tabs, video. Plus icon-grid (extra, not in blueprint).

evidence.render_strategy: Local npm install + npm run lint (fresh clone)
evidence.finding: PASS: npm run lint exits 0. .eslintrc.js uses airbnb-base, @babel/eslint-parser, no-param-reassign props:false. stylelint-config-standard. All 18 block JS/CSS files pass lint with zero errors.

evidence.render_strategy: curl HTTP GET to admin API and aem.page CDN
evidence.finding: FAIL: code.status=400 from admin API. All aem.page code files return 404. CDN error: "Missing configuration". POST /code sync processed 0 files. Code bus is not operational, preventing any visual verification of preview pages.

evidence.source_artifact: GitHub API raw file contents for all 18 blocks
evidence.render_strategy: GitHub API authenticated GET + pattern analysis
evidence.finding: PASS: All 18 blocks have export default decorate. No framework imports (no react/vue/jquery/tailwind). ES6+ patterns. .js extensions on all imports. Vanilla JS with no build step.

summary: FAIL: Code quality (lint, block structure, fstab) all PASS after retry. The critical remaining failure is the AEM code bus (code.status=400, all CDN requests return 404 with "Missing configuration" error), preventing visual verification. The orchestrator's claim of code.status=200 is contradicted by direct admin API measurement.
